items.title: Annual Report for FY 2025-26 being sent to the shareholders is enclosed
Enclosed herewith Notice of the 32nd AGM and Annual report of the Company for the Financial Year 2025-26
Please find enclosed newspaper publication w.r.t. the 24th Annual General Meeting, Annual Report and e-Voting information for the purpose of Annual General Meeting for FY 2025-26.
Pursuant to Regulation 34(1) of SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015, we enclose herewith the Annual Report of the Company along with the Notice of 32nd AGM for the Financial Year 2025-26
Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR) for the FY 2025-26 is enclosed
